rationale.fidelity: Retains the single common threshold, latent seller type, noisy score, expected platform-payoff objective, and false-positive/false-negative mechanism with no downstream review resource.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, decision, stakes, mechanism, and screening trade-off are concrete; trigger and threshold counterfactual are implicit rather than separately stated.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: The response neither requests nor claims scholarly positioning, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It labels type-conditional score differences as a model assumption and avoids claiming direct observation or perfect measurement of intent.
rationale.overall: A highly faithful, concise framing of the noisy-score admission decision with appropriate epistemic limits.
